user.title: Connect to LiteLLM Proxy
user.description: Enter your LiteLLM proxy URL and API key.

data_description.base_url: The URL of your LiteLLM proxy (e.g. https://my-litellm-proxy.example.com)

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the LiteLLM proxy. Check the URL and try again.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key. Please check your LiteLLM virtual key.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the logs for more details.

data_description.prompt: Instructions for the AI. Leave blank to use the default Home Assistant prompt.
data_description.llm_hass_api: Select a Home Assistant LLM API to allow the agent to control your home.

abort.already_configured: This conversation agent is already configured.
This AI task provider is already configured.

authentication_error.message: Authentication failed. Check your LiteLLM API key.

rate_limit_error.message: LiteLLM rate limit exceeded. Please try again later.

connection_error.message: Unable to connect to the LiteLLM proxy.
